title: Midweather Fingerprint LC322 S_eval Manifest Schema
description: Schema for the S_eval manifest of the Midweather-Fingerprint-Gate experiment. The schema validates the manifest's structural shape only; the freeze-tie check (protocol_freeze_id matches the protocol freeze's freeze_id, protocol_freeze_commit matches the protocol freeze's protocol_commit) is enforced at runtime by assert_valid_seval_manifest in doctor/adversarial/midweather_fingerprint_features.py. The schema intentionally does NOT enumerate stub-specific fields (pack_source, strategy_families, n_solvers, reconstruction_note) so that a recovered original external blind pack can use the same schema without modification.

schema_version.description: Schema version this manifest conforms to.

s_eval_id.description: Stable identifier for the S_eval pack.

problem_id.description: The problem identifier this S_eval targets.

protocol_freeze_id.description: Must equal the protocol freeze's freeze_id at runtime. The schema only checks it is a non-empty string; the actual tie is enforced by assert_valid_seval_manifest.

protocol_freeze_commit.description: Must equal the protocol freeze's protocol_commit at runtime. The schema only checks it is a non-empty string; the actual tie is enforced by assert_valid_seval_manifest.

protocol_freeze_sha256.description: Optional SHA256 of the protocol freeze file. The schema does not enforce a hex pattern because the manifest can legitimately inherit a placeholder string (e.g. PENDING_SELF_REFERENCE_AT_FREEZE_TIME) from the freeze's frozen_files entry. If present and the freeze's own SHA is computable, assert_valid_seval_manifest verifies the values match.

certification_level.description: One of EXTERNAL_BLIND_PACK or other certified-clean level. SELF_REPORTED is rejected at runtime by validate_seval_freeze_tie.

solver_source.description: Free-text source identifier. The schema only requires it is a non-empty string.

solver_files.description: List of solver file entries. Must be non-empty. Each entry has a stable solver_id and a 64-char hex SHA256 of the solver's source. The schema does NOT enforce how many entries there are, what the solver_ids look like, or what other fields each entry may carry, so the schema is compatible with both reconstructed stub packs and any recovered original pack.

causal_certification.description: Causal certification block. certified_clean is required and must be a boolean; the other fields are optional to keep the schema forward-compatible.

certified_clean.description: Whether the S_eval pack is certified clean of contamination with the protocol design. Validated at runtime by clean_run_refusal_reasons.

created_after_protocol_freeze.description: Optional flag. If present must be boolean. The runtime tie check enforces the value.
